<Badge text="svelte5-best-practices" variant="note" /> <Badge text="18 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add ejirocodes/agent-skills --skill svelte5-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/svelte5-best-practices`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/svelte5-best-practices.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add ejirocodes/agent-skills --skill svelte5-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Svelte 5 best practices focused on runes ($state, $derived, $props), snippets for modular UI, SvelteKit data loading and patterns. Addresses common migration pitfalls from Svelte 4 stores. Community-vetted guidance for high-performance type-safe Svelte apps.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add ejirocodes/agent-skills --skill svelte5-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`; status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[ejirocodes/agent-skills](https://github.com/ejirocodes/agent-skills) (community)

## Comparable Alternatives

Official Svelte/SvelteKit docs or other frontend framework best-practice skills (vue, react runes equivalents); general SvelteKit skills.

&gt; Evidence synthesized from public web sources (GitHub repos, official docs, skill registries); confidence reflects source reputation and public signals only. Not an endorsement.
